name: DPDP Assessment Report
subject: Your DPDP Readiness Report - {{ doc.org_name }}
response_html:
Dear {{ doc.contact_name or doc.org_name }},

Thank you for completing the DPDP Navigator self-assessment. Your full readiness report is attached to this email as a PDF.

{{ doc.total_score | int }}/50
Overall Readiness Score
{{ band_emoji }} {{ band_label }}

Your report includes

  • Executive summary with sector-specific risks
  • 30 / 90 / 365-day action roadmap
  • Question-by-question breakdown with compliance rationale
  • Glossary of DPDP Act terms
  • References and further reading

Please save the attached PDF — it is your permanent record of this assessment.

Retake the Assessment

If you would like expert guidance on implementing these recommendations, our team is here to help.

Request a DPDP Advisory Consultation →

Questions? Write to us at dpdp@projecttech4dev.org

Tech4Dev · DPDP Readiness Navigator
dpdp.projecttech4dev.org

This email was sent because you completed a DPDP self-assessment.
response:
Dear {{ doc.contact_name or doc.org_name }},

Thank you for completing the DPDP Navigator self-assessment.

Your full readiness report is attached as a PDF. Please save it — it is your permanent record of this assessment.

Overall Score: {{ doc.total_score | int }}/50 — {{ band_emoji }} {{ band_label }}

Your report includes:
- Executive summary with sector-specific risks
- 30 / 90 / 365-day action roadmap
- Question-by-question breakdown with compliance rationale
- Glossary of DPDP Act terms
- References and further reading

To retake the assessment: https://dpdp.projecttech4dev.org/assess

Questions? Write to us at dpdp@projecttech4dev.org
